params.name: Night Bloom II
params.description:
On Jan 11, 2000 AD, sculptor Mukerji created this clay sculpture.
Night Bloom II is the masterpiece of sculptor Mukerji. Its folded clay is an abstract representation of the female form sitting in the lotus position. The lower half of the pottery sculpture is painted with a blue-red glaze, while the upper half has a fabric imprint. The folds form wrinkles, making the work feel full of vitality.
